notes: Our patches to tool/lemon.c and tool/mkkeywordhash.c add a `-J<path>` flag that writes a machine-readable JSON dump of the parser tables / keyword table for the JS build.  Nothing else is modified.  See claude-lemon/vendor/patched/*.c for the patched versions; claude-lemon/vendor/upstream/<version>/ holds the pristine upstream baseline for 3-way merge purposes.  tool/lempar.c and src/parse.y are vendored read-only — we don't patch them, but the JSON emitter and JS runtime depend on their shapes, so changes trigger an audit (see scripts/updateSqliteSource.ts).
